html:
2026-0569
2026-06-11NRPublic Service Employment ActAppointment of the Chairperson of the Independent Advisory Board on Eligibility for Journalism Tax MeasuresAppointment of Margo Marian Goodhand of Victoria, British Columbia, to be a special adviser to the Minister of National Revenue, to serve as Chairperson of the Independent Advisory Board on Eligibility for Journalism Tax Measures, to hold office during pleasure for a term of five years, on a part-time basis.N/A
subject: Appointment of the Chairperson of the Independent Advisory Board on Eligibility for Journalism Tax Measures
precis: Appointment of Margo Marian Goodhand of Victoria, British Columbia, to be a special adviser to the Minister of National Revenue, to serve as Chairperson of the Independent Advisory Board on Eligibility for Journalism Tax Measures, to hold office during pleasure for a term of five years, on a part-time basis.
